write_file {"path":"Makefile","content":"# Makefile for LightningEngine V150
# Compiler settings
CXX = g++
CXXFLAGS = -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -I./src/include -I./third_party/SDL3/include -I./third_party/glm/include -I./third_party/Assimp/include
LDFLAGS = -L./third_party/SDL3/lib/x64 -L./third_party/Assimp/lib
LIBS = -lSDL3 -lassimpd -lopengl32

# Build configurations
DEBUG_FLAGS = -g -D_DEBUG
RELEASE_FLAGS = -O3 -DNDEBUG

# Source files
SRC_DIR = .
SRC_FILES = $(SRC_DIR)/Editor.cpp \
            src/core/Engine.cpp \
            src/core/Window.cpp \
            src/graphics/Renderer.cpp

# Object files
OBJ_DIR = obj
OBJ_FILES = $(OBJ_DIR)/Editor.o \
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Engine.o \
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Window.o \
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Renderer.o

# Output executable
TARGET = LightningEngine.exe

# Default target
all: release

# Debug build
debug: CXXFLAGS += $(DEBUG_FLAGS)
debug: $(TARGET)

# Release build
release: CXXFLAGS += $(RELEASE_FLAGS)
release: $(TARGET)

# Link executable
$(TARGET): $(OBJ_FILES)
	$(CXX) $(OBJ_FILES) $(LDFLAGS) $(LIBS) -o $@

# Compile source files
$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: %.cpp
	@mkdir -p $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: src/core/%.cpp
	@mkdir -p $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: src/graphics/%.cpp
	@mkdir -p $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

# Clean build artifacts
clean:
	rm -rf $(OBJ_DIR) $(TARGET)

# Run the application
run: release
	./$(TARGET)

# Install dependencies (copy DLLs)
install-dlls:
	@echo "Copying required DLLs..."
	copy "third_party\SDL3\lib\x64\*.dll" . 2>nul || echo "No DLLs to copy"
	copy "third_party\Assimp\lib\*.dll" . 2>nul || echo "No DLLs to copy"

.PHONY: all debug release clean run install-dlls
"}

write_file {"path":"Makefile","content":"# Makefile for LightningEngine V150 - Windows Compatible
# Compiler settings
CXX = g++
CXXFLAGS = -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -I./src/include -I./third_party/SDL3/include -I./third_party/glm/include -I./third_party/Assimp/include
LDFLAGS = -L./third_party/SDL3/lib/x64 -L./third_party/Assimp/lib
LIBS = -lSDL3 -lassimpd -lopengl32

# Build configurations
DEBUG_FLAGS = -g -D_DEBUG
RELEASE_FLAGS = -O3 -DNDEBUG

# Source files
SRC_DIR = .
SRC_FILES = $(SRC_DIR)/Editor.cpp \
            src/core/Engine.cpp \
            src/core/Window.cpp \
            src/graphics/Renderer.cpp

# Object files
OBJ_DIR = obj
OBJ_FILES = $(OBJ_DIR)/Editor.o \
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Engine.o \
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Window.o \
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Renderer.o

# Output executable
TARGET = LightningEngine.exe

# Windows-specific commands
MKDIR = if not exist $(OBJ_DIR) mkdir $(OBJ_DIR)
RM = del /Q /F
RMDIR = rmdir /S /Q

# Default target
all: release

# Debug build
debug: CXXFLAGS += $(DEBUG_FLAGS)
debug: $(TARGET)

# Release build
release: CXXFLAGS += $(RELEASE_FLAGS)
release: $(TARGET)

# Link executable
$(TARGET): $(OBJ_FILES)
	$(CXX) $(OBJ_FILES) $(LDFLAGS) $(LIBS) -o $@

# Compile source files - Windows compatible
$(OBJ_DIR)/Editor.o: Editor.cpp
	$(MKDIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/Engine.o: src/core/Engine.cpp
	$(MKDIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/Window.o: src/core/Window.cpp
	$(MKDIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/Renderer.o: src/graphics/Renderer.cpp
	$(MKDIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

# Clean build artifacts - Windows compatible
clean:
	-$(RM) $(TARGET) 2>nul
	-$(RMDIR) $(OBJ_DIR) 2>nul
	@echo Clean completed.

# Run the application
run: release
	$(TARGET)

# Install dependencies (copy DLLs)
install-dlls:
	@echo Copying required DLLs...
	copy "third_party\SDL3\lib\x64\*.dll" . 2>nul || echo No SDL3 DLLs to copy
	copy "third_party\Assimp\lib\*.dll" . 2>nul || echo No Assimp DLLs to copy

.PHONY: all debug release clean run install-dlls
"}
session-start goal=desenvolva as configurações necessarias para rodar a aplicação usando o msvc no lugar de G++
session-start goal=o caminho para o visualstudio nesse pc é D:\Arquivos\HDDR\Microsoft\VisualStudio\VS26\

write_file {"path":"build-msvc.bat","content":"@echo off
REM Build script for LightningEngine using MSVC
REM Visual Studio path: D:\Arquivos\HDDR\Microsoft\VisualStudio\VS26\

setlocal enabledelayedexpansion

REM Set Visual Studio path
set VS_PATH=D:\Arquivos\HDDR\Microsoft\VisualStudio\VS26

REM Check if Visual Studio exists
if not exist "%VS_PATH%\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" (
    echo ERROR: Visual Studio not found at %VS_PATH%
    echo Please verify the Visual Studio installation path.
    pause
    exit /b 1
)

REM Configuration (Debug or Release)
set CONFIG=Release
if not "%1"=="" set CONFIG=%1

REM Platform (x64 or Win32)
set PLATFORM=x64
if not "%2"=="" set PLATFORM=%2

echo ========================================
echo Building LightningEngine with MSVC
echo Visual Studio: %VS_PATH%
echo Configuration: %CONFIG%
echo Platform: %PLATFORM%
echo ========================================

REM Setup MSVC environment
call "%VS_PATH%\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=%PLATFORM%

REM Build the solution
MSBuild LightningEngine.sln /p:Configuration=%CONFIG% /p:Platform=%PLATFORM% /m

if %ERRORLEVEL% EQU 0 (
    echo.
    echo ========================================
    echo BUILD SUCCESSFUL!
    echo Executable: %PLATFORM%\%CONFIG%\LightningEngine.exe
    echo ========================================
    
    REM Copy DLLs if needed
    if exist "third_party\SDL3\lib\x64\*.dll" (
        copy "third_party\SDL3\lib\x64\*.dll" "%PLATFORM%\%CONFIG%\" >nul 2>&1
        echo SDL3 DLLs copied to output directory.
    )
    
    REM Optionally run the executable
    echo.
    echo To run the application:
    echo   %PLATFORM%\%CONFIG%\LightningEngine.exe
) else (
    echo.
    echo ========================================
    echo BUILD FAILED!
    echo ========================================
    exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%
)

pause
"}

# Makefile for LightningEngine V150
# Compiler settings
CXX = g++
CXXFLAGS = -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -I./src/include -I./third_party/SDL3/include -I./third_party/glm/include -I./third_party/Assimp/include
LDFLAGS = -L./third_party/SDL3/lib/x64 -L./third_party/Assimp/lib

# Makefile for LightningEngine V150
# Compiler settings
CXX = g++
CXXFLAGS = -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -I./src/include -I./third_party/SDL3/include -I./third_party/glm/include -I./third_party/Assimp/include
LDFLAGS = -L./third_party/SDL3/lib/x64 -L./third_party/Assimp/lib
LIBS = -lSDL3 -lassimpd -lopengl32

# Build configurations
DEBUG_FLAGS = -g -D_DEBUG
RELEASE_FLAGS = -O3 -DNDEBUG

# Source files
SRC_DIR = .
SRC_FILES = $(SRC_DIR)/Editor.cpp /
            src/core/Engine.cpp /
            src/core/Window.cpp /
            src/graphics/Renderer.cpp

# Object files
OBJ_DIR = obj
OBJ_FILES = $(OBJ_DIR)/Editor.o /
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Engine.o /
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Window.o /
            $(OBJ_DIR)/Renderer.o

# Output executable
TARGET = LightningEngine.exe

# Default target
all: release

# Debug build
debug: CXXFLAGS += $(DEBUG_FLAGS)
debug: $(TARGET)

# Release build
release: CXXFLAGS += $(RELEASE_FLAGS)
release: $(TARGET)

# Link executable
$(TARGET): $(OBJ_FILES)
	$(CXX) $(OBJ_FILES) $(LDFLAGS) $(LIBS) -o $@

# Compile source files
$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: %.cpp
	@mkdir -p $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: src/core/%.cpp
	@mkdir -p $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

$(OBJ_DIR)/%.o: src/graphics/%.cpp
	@mkdir -p $(OBJ_DIR)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

# Clean build artifacts
clean:
	rm -rf $(OBJ_DIR) $(TARGET)

# Run the application
run: release
	./$(TARGET)

# Install dependencies (copy DLLs)
install-dlls:
	@echo "Copying required DLLs..."
	copy "third_party/SDL3/lib/x64/*.dll" . 2>nul || echo "No DLLs to copy"
	copy "third_party/Assimp/lib/*.dll" . 2>nul || echo "No DLLs to copy"

.PHONY: all debug release clean run install-dlls
